source: CEN/Cenelec mandate M/575 (requested, not yet published in OJEU as harmonised)
note: These standards are widely used for MDR compliance but have not yet been formally harmonised (published in OJEU under CID 2021/1182). They are part of the 277 requested standards under mandate M/575.
